domain: Madagascan famadihana 'turning of the bones' (Malagasy reburial; every 5-7 years bones exhumed, rewrapped in fresh lamba mena silk, names rewritten, danced around tomb, reburied; cyclical refresh accumulating wrappings)
specific_mechanism: Periodic checkpoint refresh by loading oldest checkpoint, applying continued pre-training on current-distribution data (the 'fresh wrapping'), writing back with freshness-tag while preserving original; ensemble inference over recent wrappings.
llm_application: FAMADIHANA-CYCLE: a cyclical checkpoint-refresh training method. Every K epochs the system loads the OLDEST checkpoint from registry, wraps it in fresh data (continued pre-training on current-distribution sample for one mini-epoch), writes back with new freshness-tag while PRESERVING original. At inference, ensemble over K-most-recent wrappings weighted by recency. Differs from SSR Self-Synthesized Rehearsal (synthetic samples not real recycled checkpoint), SSU Source-Shielded Updates (parameter freezing not cyclical refresh), continual pretraining (uni-directional not cyclical) by combining (a) preserved-original checkpoint registry, (b) periodic re-wrapping with fresh data, (c) ensemble inference over wrapped versions.
novelty_claim: Continual pretraining (2401.03129), SSR, SSU already cover catastrophic-forgetting mitigation. FAMADIHANA-CYCLE recombines cyclical-refresh + preserved-original + ensemble. Recombination of existing components.
